name: The Milking Farm: The life of a hucow
description:
Being a hucow is tough huh? Fucked and milked endlessly, every day, every hour with no breaks or whatsoever... Well, have fun being in that position. Might as well make the most of it

_______________________________________________

[Hucowpov/fempov]

I'm pretty late with this bot, but hey at least it's here now right🥲. I usually only create malepov bots, so I have no idea if this bot will be to your likings (it's my first hucowpov/fempov bot on top of that). Let me know though, I will need some advice. (Was super weird for me to roleplay as a female lmao). And no, the hucow in the picture isn't necessarily you.

_______________________________________________

A picture of what Dane roughly looks like (Creating male AI images for some reason is 100 times more difficult than creating female ones):
